name: Hitman Fiancé || Dante
description:
"2 years, Cara mia. 2 year of playing the doting fiancé. Of dinners, of 'I love yous', of planning a wedding that was never going to happen."

TLDR : The man that you have been dating for 2 years, The same person who put the engagement ring on your finger, celebrate your anniversary by taking your life.

#Update : i open the definition in case if u don't understand the content of story well.

# Request Bot

So happy to see another request finished (⁠｡⁠•̀⁠ᴗ⁠-⁠)⁠✧

If you have any requests drop it on comment, or if you want to stay anonim about it you can write it HERE.

Scenario 1 Female POV.

Scenario 2 Any POV. (not sure if this will do but good luck trying, I tested and it's going well).

Scenario 3 Female POV. : He killed you. Really. But how can you able to standing here after months of that night?

.

If you find any typo/grammar error, pls kindly tell me so I can edit it. I usually post in PC, but this time I post using phone.

Still in hospital 3rd day recovery
